suite.name: DemoTest

kw.name: Open App
Open Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open

WebDriverException: Message: Error getting device platform version. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\Momadin\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s 85058905 shell getprop ro.build.version.release' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb.exe: device unauthorized. This adb server's $ADB_VENDOR_KEYS is not set Try 'adb kill-server' if that seems wrong. Otherwise check for a confirmation dialog on your device.
Stacktrace: UnknownError: Error getting device platform version. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\Momadin\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s 85058905 shell getprop ro.build.version.release' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb.exe: device unauthorized. This adb server's $ADB_VENDOR_KEYS is not set Try 'adb kill-server' if that seems wrong. Otherwise check for a confirmation dialog on your device.
at getResponseForW3CError (C:\Users\Momadin\AppData\Roaming
pm
ode_modules\appium
ode_modules\@appium ase-driver uild\lib\protocol\errors.js:824:36) at asyncHandler (C:\Users\Momadin\AppData\Roaming

This adb server's $ADB_VENDOR_KEYS is not set Try 'adb kill-server' if that seems wrong. Otherwise check for a confirmation dialog on your device.

kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Close Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

suite.status:
